title: Massively More Starters [Cobblemon]
description: Adds a TON more starters to the starter screen. Neutral natures and 3 perfect IVs too.
body:
Also check out [Project Lazuli](https://modrinth.com/datapack/project-lazuli-for-cobblemon-preview-version) for over 1,000 edits to Pokemon, abilities, moves, items, conditions, everything in battles!!

![Project Lazuli logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BM8vleen/d37fcd4d435de13161c943280c62c67156cbc4d5.png)



Feel too original and special for your average starter in the Cobblemon mod? Pick from a list of tons of Pokemon based on starter selections from various spinoffs like Mystery Dungeon or fangames like choosing Larvitar from Pokemon Prism or even Baltoy from Snakewood! Since, y'know, there's zombies here. You can even select very certain Pokemon like female Combee to guarantee a Vespiquen, a male Ralts to guarantee a Gallade, or a female Salandit to guarantee a Salazzle!﻿

You and your friends can now choose what fits your personality best! From mons with late-game potential like Beldum, to mons with late-game potential like Magikarp! And I guess rare mons like Porygon.

**ALL Pokemon, even the original starters, will also have a neutral nature and a random choice of 3 perfect IVs!**

**Some Pokemon might still have the substitute model on them, so I'd recommend something like AllTheMons or AllTheMons x Mega Showdown or the like.**

A very few select common/uncommon Pokemon also have some very minimal egg moves that probably won't see much use beyond the early game.

<details>
<summary>Moves given</summary>
  
  Turtwig = Leafage
  
  
  Magikarp = Tackle, Flail, Bounce
  
  Paras = Metal Claw, Screech
  
  Tyrogue = VacuumWave
  
  Togepi = Peck 
  
  Cleffa = DisarmingVoice 
  
  Igglybuff = Rollout 
  
  Feebas = Tackle, Flail, Mist 
  
  Happiny = DisarmingVoice 
  
  Bonsly = Harden 
  
  Budew = Extrasensory 
  
  Panpour and friends = DisarmingVoice 
  
  Rockruff = RockThrow 
  
  Applin = DefenseCurl, Rollout 
  
  Snom = FairyWind, BugBite


</details>




<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>
"Why are the regions all jumbled up on my selection screen?"

Unfortunately not anything I can help, not exactly sure how ordering works on this.

"Where can I get support?"

The dedicated help channel for this datapack in the Cobblemon Discord server.


</details>
